---
title: "Schedule"
---

All deliverables are due on Canvas at **1:00 pm** — the start of the first section — regardless of which section you attend.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
import yaml
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

with open("schedule.yml") as f:
    sessions = yaml.safe_load(f)

def fmt_date(entry):
    d = entry.get("date")
    if not d:
        return ""
    dt = datetime.strptime(str(d), "%Y-%m-%d")
    if entry.get("exam") and entry.get("date_end"):
        end = datetime.strptime(str(entry["date_end"]), "%Y-%m-%d")
        return f"{dt.strftime('%a %b %-d')}–{end.strftime('%-d, %Y')}"
    return dt.strftime("%a %b %-d, %Y")

def fmt_prep(prep):
    if not prep:
        return "—"
    parts = []
    for item in prep:
        text = item.get("text", "")
        url = item.get("url")
        if url:
            parts.append(f'<a href="{url}">{text}</a>')
        else:
            parts.append(text)
    return "<br>".join(parts)

def fmt_out_due(entry):
    bits = []
    if entry.get("out"):
        bits.append(f'<em>Out:</em> {entry["out"]}')
    if entry.get("due"):
        bits.append(f'<span class="due-badge">DUE: {entry["due"]}, 1:00 pm</span>')
    if entry.get("assignment"):
        bits.append(f'<a href="{entry["assignment"]}">Assignment</a>')
    if entry.get("workbench"):
        wb_label = entry.get("workbench_label", "Workbench")
        bits.append(f'<a href="{entry["workbench"]}">{wb_label}</a>')
    return "<br>".join(bits) if bits else "—"

def fmt_slides(entry):
  if entry.get("slides"):
      return f'<a href="{entry["slides"]}">Slides</a>'
  return '<span class="locked-link">After class</span>'

print("| Date | Session / Topic | Prepare | Out / Due | Slides |")
print("|:-----|:----------------|:--------|:----------|:-------|")

for entry in sessions:
    sess = entry.get("session")
    sess_label = f"**{sess}.** " if sess is not None else ""
    topic = entry.get("topic", "")
    note = entry.get("note")
    if note:
        topic += f" *({note})*"
    if entry.get("laptop_required"):
        topic += " *(laptops required)*"
    print(
        f"| {fmt_date(entry)} "
        f"| {sess_label}{topic} "
        f"| {fmt_prep(entry.get('prep', []))} "
        f"| {fmt_out_due(entry)} "
        f"| {fmt_slides(entry)} |"
    )
```

See also: [Materials](materials.qmd) · [Problem Sets](assignments.qmd) · [Syllabus](syllabus.qmd) · [Cases](cases.qmd)
